contact.heading: Let's chat!
contact.description: I'm currently looking for a UX/UI Designer role where design decisions are grounded in real user needs and accessibility is taken seriously. If that sounds like your team, I'd love to hear from you. I enjoy sharing what I know and I’m always open to sharing knowledge through workshops and talks on accessibility or design.

socialMedia.heading: Social Media
socialMedia.description: You can meet me at conferences MacMeeting. If any project caught your attention or you’d like to connect, feel free to reach out — always open to a quick chat or exchanging ideas. I speak Polish and English.
